data.title: SuperAwesome buys Starglow Media, world's largest family audio content provider, expanding youth engagement.
data.description: In a recent development, SuperAwesome has acquired Starglow Media, known as the world's largest ecosystem of premium kids and family audio content. This acquisition is set to bolster SuperAwesome's youth engagement capabilities significantly.

data.title: Bullish Shiba Inu price prediction targets $0.000010 despite limited technical data signals. RSI at 58.66 and positive MACD.
data.description: The price prediction for SHIB indicates a positive trend, with bullish momentum indicators showing strength. The Relative Strength Index (RSI) is at 58.66 and the Moving Average Convergence Divergence (MACD) histogram is positive. However, due to limitations in the technical data, it is advised to approach the target of $0.000010 cautiously.

data.title: Forecast targets $0.73 for Worldcoin (WLD) by Feb 2026 on technical uptrend, with RSI at 56.38. Price above moving averages supports potential breakout.
data.description: Worldcoin (WLD) is currently experiencing a positive trend as indicated by its Relative Strength Index (RSI) at 56.38 and its price above significant moving averages. Technical analysis forecasts a potential target of $0.73 if the current resistance level is surpassed.

data.title: SUI price aims $2.20 by month-end, currently at $1.83 with strong support at $1.73 and RSI 63.6. Bullish MACD signals a potential breakout.
data.description: The stock SUI is currently being traded at $1.83, showcasing bullish momentum according to the MACD indicator, with a target set at the $2.20 resistance level. The technical analysis indicates a neutral Relative Strength Index (RSI) of 63.6. Additionally, there is a notable strong support level at $1.73, which could potentially confirm a breakout in the near future.

data.title: Optimism (OP) poised to hit $0.36-$0.38 by February, with current price at $0.34 and RSI at 63.49, nearing Bollinger Band resistance. Technical breakout signals support the potential price targets.
data.description: The current market sentiment for Optimism (OP) is positive as it demonstrates a strong bullish trend, trading at $0.34 per unit, with the Relative Strength Index (RSI) standing at 63.49. The price is hovering close to the upper resistance level of the Bollinger Bands. Analysts predict that if the crucial resistance barrier is breached, the price could surge towards the range of $0.36 to $0.38 per unit in the upcoming 2 to 4 weeks. This indicates potential growth in the near future for OP, based on technical indicators.

data.title: Report analyzes valuation implications of domestic rare earth supply chain reshoring, focusing on leading mining and processing beneficiaries.
data.description: The report titled "Valuation Implications of Domestic Rare Earth Supply Chain Reshoring: A Market and Corporate Analysis of Leading Mining and Processing Beneficiaries" is now available on ResearchAndMarkets.com. In a world where technological independence is highly valued, this report provides insights into the market and corporate aspects of leading mining and processing beneficiaries in the rare earth supply chain reshoring industry. The report offers valuable analysis in this field.

data.title: Royal Gold shares updates on Q4 2025 stream segment sales, balance sheet, non-core assets, and Q4 results release.
data.description: Royal Gold, based in Denver, has given an update on their Q4 2025 Stream Segment Sales, Balance Sheet, and Non-Core Asset Rationalization. They also announced details regarding the release of their Q4 2025 results. The company reported strong numbers in their stream segment sales and emphasized efforts to optimize their balance sheet through non-core asset rationalization. Investors can expect detailed financial results for Q4 2025 to be released soon.

data.title: AARP Pennsylvania warns of 5 scams targeting older adults in 2026, urging vigilance against evolving fraud tactics.
data.description: In Harrisburg, Pennsylvania, on January 13, 2026, AARP is cautioning residents to remain vigilant as they enter the new year against five potential scams aimed at older adults. Experts in fraud prevention are highlighting the increasing sophistication of traditional scams and the emergence of novel deceptive tactics. The organization is emphasizing the importance of staying informed and being cautious to protect against financial exploitation.

data.title: SAS Viya now on Microsoft Azure Gov for US public sector, speeding security, data protection.
data.description: In a recent development on January 13, 2026, in Cary, North Carolina, public sector entities, along with their partners and systems integrators, have access to a new deployment option that enhances security and data protection. This advancement comes as more government agencies transition to cloud services. This option allows for faster deployment of the data and artificial intelligence platform, offering advanced capabilities to secure sensitive information. The move aims to streamline processes and safeguard data more effectively in the evolving digital landscape.

data.title: Golden Triangle Ventures (OTC: GTVH) is experiencing a turnaround with cleanup nearing completion, balance sheet strengthening, and core businesses accelerating towards 2026 expansion.
data.description: Austin, TX - On January 13, 2026, Golden Triangle Ventures (OTC: GTVH) released a corporate update indicating a strategic transition into its next phase. The company is nearing completion of the final tasks related to legacy cleanup efforts while also bolstering its financial standing. Moreover, they are ramping up activities within their key operational sectors to enhance growth opportunities.

data.title: Helio Corporation is aiming to lead the Space-Based Solar Power market amidst increasing global focus.
data.description: Helio Corporation is positioning itself to lead the emerging space-based solar power market. Recent media coverage has focused on startups proposing orbital data centers powered by space-based solar energy for niche applications. However, Helio emphasizes the larger opportunity of delivering continuous, reliable, clean energy from space to Earth at utility scale. The company believes that as discussions about orbital energy infrastructure increase, a competitive race for commercial leadership in space-based solar power is emerging. Helio believes it is uniquely positioned to win that race.

data.title: XTL Biopharmaceuticals buys 85% of NeuroNOS to tap into autism market with top scientific leaders, including two Nobel Laureates.
data.description: Renowned autism researcher Prof. Haitham Amal, along with two Nobel Laureates, have teamed up, bringing unmatched scientific expertise to their research efforts. With the collaboration, they aim to further advance autism research on a global scale, leveraging the combined knowledge and experience of the eminent individuals. This collaboration marks a significant milestone in the field of autism research, promising groundbreaking discoveries and insights.

data.title: Performance Shipping Inc. placed successful USD 50M tap issue for senior secured bond, total now $150M with 9.875% coupon.
data.description: ATHENS, Greece - On January 13, 2026, Performance Shipping Inc. (NASDAQ: PSHG) revealed that they successfully completed a tap issue for their senior secured bond due July 17, 2029, with ISIN: NO0013607028, adding USD 50 million to their existing bond. The total outstanding amount under the Bonds has now reached USD 150 million. This tap issue, with a fixed coupon of 9.875% per annum, payable semi-annually, was priced at 103.00% of par value. Initiated by a reverse inquiry, the tap issue is set to conclude on January 26, 2026, subject to customary closing conditions. The net proceeds from this action will be utilized for general corporate purposes as outlined in the terms of the Bonds.

data.title: Warren questions SEC on Trump's crypto in 401(k) plans, citing family's $1.2B crypto gain; sees conflict of interest.
data.description: Senator Elizabeth Warren is demanding answers from SEC Chair Paul Atkins on how the agency will protect retirement savers following President Trump's approval for crypto in 401(k) plans. Warren raised concerns that Trump's family has made $1.2 billion from crypto ventures since he took office. She sent a letter to Atkins warning that the current draft of the crypto market legislation being negotiated by the Senate Banking Committee could weaken SEC authority and expose 401(k) plans to volatile crypto assets. Trump's sudden support for crypto is believed to be motivated by his financial interests. The letter precedes a committee markup on the crypto bill scheduled for Thursday. Warren also cautioned that the proposed legislation could create a "tokenization loophole" enabling blockchain-based financial products to bypass SEC regulations.

data.title: ECD Automotive Design launches Heritage Product Line for Defender 90 and 110, celebrating the Defender's origins.
data.description: The Heritage line of Defender vehicles is now offered in both Defender 90 and Defender 110 versions. This special line pays tribute to the origins of the Defender model.

data.title: Seal Security partners with Wiz, joining WIN to deliver secure container base images for vulnerability remediation.
data.description: In Tel Aviv, Israel on January 13, 2026, Seal Security has revealed its collaboration with top cloud security provider Wiz and is now a member of the Wiz Integration Network (WIN). This partnership bolsters WIN with Seal Security's robust base images, emphasizing the importance of cybersecurity.
